summary: Created first IJCAI/LogiSymb regular-paper TeX draft, bibliography, local style files, paper figures, and experiment audit; static checks pass, LaTeX compile unavailable because pdflatex is not installed.

Completed round-1 harsh review fixes: added surface-control residual analyses, output Wilson CIs, cleaner paper figures, expanded citations, exact method details, and rewrote paper around role-reversal robustness vs artifact-sensitive negation.

Completed round-2 review fixes: added hypotheses/failure criteria, corrected dataset directed-row wording and 2023 repo citation, reframed output results as stress tests, added sign-aware FDR counts, and regenerated figures with TrueType fonts.

Completed round-3 final review fixes: narrowed role claims, added negation hypothesis, added source-pair clustering caveat, clarified Frobenius clipping and Gemma wording, and expanded compile checklist. Source-level checks pass; final PDF must be rebuilt externally.
